name: Hina-chan's Sticker Survival
short_description: Hina-chan's phone has broken and can't text or make calls! Use stickers to keep her friends fooled so they don't find out!
detailed_description:
Hina-chan's phone has broken and can't text or make calls!

In this game, a sort of roguelite sticker deckbuilder, you'll help Hina-chan by selecting stickers to send to her friends Nitori, Suika, and Joon to avoid suspicion.

For example, if they ask you what you ate for breakfast, you could use a meat sticker and they'll interpret that as you saying you had meat.

Or, you could use an X sticker, which they'll interpret as you saying you didn't have anything.

But of course, you could also send the wrong stickers and just watch how they react instead.

That might be fun too. Gather useful stickers and cards to survive all the chats, and help Hina-chan make it through all the way 'til the end!

*This game is a Touhou Project fangame.
